title: transaction — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — read by owner + admin + finance role; reversal by owner + admin ONLY (finance role does NOT hold reverse — reversal is regulator-critical + admin-only). NO create / update / delete permissions on tenant plane — transactions are recorded via internal service (TransactionRecorder) called by invoice / payment / refund / chargeback modules. Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant support tooling for ops + support + super_admin.

permissions.name: transaction.reverse
permissions.description: Manual ledger correction. Creates a NEW offsetting transaction with reversal_reason='accounting_adjustment'. Requires a written note + writes to audits with 7-year retention. Regulator-critical — admin ONLY (finance role does NOT hold).

permissions.name: transaction.ledger.account_balance.view
permissions.description: View running balance for a specific ledger account.

permissions.name: transaction.ledger.report.view
permissions.description: General Ledger report. Medium+ via transaction_advanced_reporting entitlement.

permissions.name: transaction.ledger.reconciliation.view
permissions.description: View the nightly reconciliation-run audit trail + any detected imbalances.

permissions.name: platform.transaction.ledger_entries.viewAny
permissions.description: Cross-tenant ledger-entry read for support-tool investigations + audit walk-throughs.

permissions.name: platform.transaction.ledger.reconcile
permissions.description: Force a reconciliation run cross-tenant. Used during regulator audits + escalated imbalance investigations. Every fire notifies the tenant + writes an audit row with 7-year retention.

permissions.name: platform.transaction.ledger.imbalances.view
permissions.description: Cross-tenant view of any detected ledger imbalances. Feeds the ops finance-health dashboard.
